requirements.text: Strip ` thinking` and ` response` markers from GLM 5.1 assistant `content` when they leak
requirements.acceptance: Content passed to downstream consumers contains no ` thinking` or ` response` markers

requirements.text: Move leaked thinking content to `reasoning_content` field
requirements.acceptance: When thinking content is extracted, it populates `reasoning_content` on the message

requirements.text: Do NOT strip markers from non-GLM models
requirements.acceptance: Messages from DeepSeek, Kimi, Qwen, etc. pass through unchanged
CoT stripping happens in same hook as tool call repair; no additional hook overhead

requirements.text: Handle edge cases: partial leaks, markers embedded in code blocks, empty thinking
requirements.acceptance: No crash, no corrupted content, graceful fallback

requirements.text: Tests cover all marker presence patterns
requirements.acceptance: ≥6 test cases: both markers present, neither present, thinking-only, response-only, thinking with tool calls, empty thinking between markers

success_criteria: GLM 5.1 assistant messages with leaked ` thinking`/` response` markers are cleaned
Leaked thinking content is moved to `reasoning_content` field
No regressions in existing reasoning tests
